name: TerraformPlanViewer
description: Attach a Terraform plan to the build so it renders in the Terraform Plan tab.
helpMarkdown: Point this task at the Terraform plan file produced by `terraform plan -out=...`. Either the binary plan or the JSON form (`terraform show -json`) is accepted; if a binary plan is given, the task converts it automatically using the `terraform` CLI on the agent.
author: Terraform Tools

inputs.name: planPath
inputs.label: Terraform plan file
inputs.helpMarkdown:
Path to a Terraform plan. Either form is accepted:
- The binary file produced by `terraform plan -out=tfplan` (e.g. `$(System.DefaultWorkingDirectory)/tfplan`). The task will convert it via `terraform show -json` automatically — this requires the `terraform` CLI on PATH (running a TerraformInstaller or TerraformTaskV4 step earlier in the pipeline is enough).
- The JSON form produced by `terraform show -json tfplan > tfplan.json`.

inputs.name: attachmentName
inputs.label: Attachment name
inputs.helpMarkdown: Identifier for the attachment, also used as the label in the tab's plan selector. Use distinct names per stage/environment (e.g. `dev`, `staging`, `prod`) when publishing multiple plans in one build — the tab will show a dropdown to switch between them. Allowed characters: letters, digits, underscore, hyphen.
